calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Appointment Of Successor And Modification/Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Appointment Of Successor And Modification/Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Continued To Sep-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Remigius Chibueze appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Endy Ukoha-Ajike for Trustee/Respondent.

The Court noted that Ms. Forster was ordered to provide an accounting by June 12, 2017. Mr. Ajike stated that his Client was told to do an accounting, that there is no money in the Trust to pay an Accountant, that instead he tried to file a response to the petition, that the response was rejected indicating that there is no petition to respond to, and that he tried to file it again and was told that the case was consolidated and he needed the new case number. Mr. Ajike also stated that the Trust only has a property that was vandalized, that there is no cash in the Trust and that his Client can not pay out of her own pocket. The Court stated that the Court order stands, that nothing has been done to modify or vacate the order and that it is now two months since the accounting was due. Mr. Ajike stated that they have been talking and that there is an offer on the table to resolve the matter. Mr. Chibueze stated that the documents that were provided do not provide a clear picture as to the bank accounts, that the value of the property presented is not acceptable to his Client, that because of this they are unable to resolve the matter and that his Client does not have faith in the Trustee to carry out her fiduciary duties. Mr. Ajike stated that he drafted the Trust, that the accounts listed on schedule-A were never transferred to the Trust and that the accounts were liquidated by the Decedent prior to his death. The Court advised Mr. Ajike that the Trustee's failure to do the accounting and comply with the Court order will be considered as evidence that she is unable to carry out her duties. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to September 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that the accounting needs to be provided by then to assess Ms. Forster status as Trustee.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Appointment Of Successor And Modification/Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Continued To Aug-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike appeared by telephone for Ijnanya Foster.
Remigius Chibueze appeared by telephone for Cleavon Foster.

Mr. Ajike stated that he is opposing, that they are negotiating on how to resolve this and asked for 90-days to file his response. Mr. Chibueze stated that 90-days is reasonable provided the Trustee provides an accounting (informal) within 30-days. Mr. Ajike responded by stating that the only asset is a property located in San Francisco and that it is the only thing to be accounted for. The Court ordered Mr. Ajike to provide an accounting to the Petitioner by June 12, 2017. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to August 16, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the parties have been working to resolve the matter.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Appointment Of Successor And Modification/Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Appointment Of Successor And Modification/Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Remigius Chibueze appeared by telephone for Cleavon Foster (Petitioner).

The Court noted that no other parties were present. Mr. Chibueze stated that he has not heard from the Trustee or the Trustee's Attorney, that he provided personal service on Monday March 27, 2017 on the Trustee and requested a 30-day continuance to allow the Trustee time to respond. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, Account, Appointment of Successor and Modification/Termination of Trust is continued to April 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Chibueze is to advise the Trustee of the hearing date. The Court suggest Counsel review the Probate Examiner's notes and address the issues raised.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Assets Beloning To The V.L. Forster Revocable Living Trust Dtd. 3/13/14.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Endy Ukoha-Ajike for the petitioner.

The Court stated that it needs a file stamped copy of the stock trade account. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike stated that it was filed on 9/24, that a copy was dropped off on 9/25 and presented a copy to the court for review. The Court stated that it understood that the properties to be confirmed were in Arkansas. Mr. Ukoha-Ajike stated that they are more anxious about the property in California, that they withdraw their request for the Arkansas properties, that this was stated in their declaration and that they want confirmation on the San Francisco property and the Scott trade account. The Court stated that if anything additional was needed in regards to the withdrawal he would be contacted and took the petition for order confirming assets belonging to the V.L. Forster revocable living trust under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chien. (Not Reported)
